title: Bos Facebook Tinggalkan Kursi CEO dan Jadi Programer Lagi
description: Mark Zuckerberg dilaporkan mendadak pindah dari meja kerjanya sekarang dan kembali jadi programer seperti awal dia mendirikan Facebook.
content: Saking ambisiusnya, pendiri Facebook ini rela "turun gunung", meninggalkan meja kebesarannya, dan memindahkan ruang kerjanya agar bisa ikut coding langsung bersama para periset AI. Manuver tak biasa ini tentu menjadi ironi tersendiri. Pasalnya, di saat pakar menggembar-gemborkan bahwa coding mulai menjadi skill yang usang akibat AI, Zuckerberg justru kembali menjadi programer. (Baca: 10 Profesi yang Kini Paling Rentan Tergusur AI ) Zuckerberg dilaporkan telah menata ulang dan memindahkan meja kerjanya secara permanen ke fasilitas lab kecerdasan buatan milik Meta . Di sana, ia kini duduk berdampingan langsung dengan tokoh-tokoh kunci pengembangan AI perusahaan, yakni Kepala AI Meta Alexandr Wang dan mantan CEO GitHub Nat Friedman. Informasi "ordal" ini dibocorkan langsung oleh Presiden Meta, Dina Powell McCormick, saat berbicara di acara Semafor World Economy Summit di Washington, D.C. "Mark benar-benar telah memindahkan mejanya. Dia sekarang duduk di lab AI bersama Alex Wang dan Nat Friedman, dan dia menulis program sepanjang hari," ungkap McCormick. Di tengah kesibukannya memimpin salah satu perusahaan paling berharga di dunia, Zuckerberg menyediakan waktu khusus sekitar 5 hingga 10 jam setiap minggunya murni untuk menulis dan meninjau baris kode dari berbagai proyek AI yang sedang dikerjakan timnya. Tentu saja, kehadiran "bos besar" yang tiba-tiba ikut campur di ruang riset teknis ini bisa memicu rasa canggung. McCormick bahkan sempat bercanda, membayangkan dirinya sebagai karyawan tim riset AI. "Di satu sisi, mereka (para periset) mungkin merasa, 'Oh luar biasa, ada tambahan masukan lagi dari Anda, Mark, saat Anda ikut coding'," ujar McCormick, seperti dihimpun KompasTekno dari BusinessInsider. Meski terdengar seperti micro-management , McCormick menegaskan bahwa langkah tersebut merupakan bentuk komitmen personal Zuckerberg yang sangat tinggi. Menurut dia, Zuckerberg ingin memahami betul seluruh seluk-beluk dan hambatan teknis demi merakit model bahasa AI yang paling canggih. Ilustrasi dibuat dengan AI. Ilustrasi meja kerja Mark Zuckerberg di lab riset Meta. Perubahan gaya kerja Zuckerberg ini sekaligus menjadi sinyal peringatan keras bagi para rivalnya, seperti OpenAI (kreator ChatGPT), Google (Gemini), hingga Anthropic. Meta memang sempat dicibir karena dianggap telat panas dan tertinggal di garis start perlombaan AI generatif. Untuk mengejar ketertinggalan tersebut, Meta baru-baru ini melakukan restrukturisasi besar-besaran dengan membentuk divisi Superintelligence Labs. Tak tanggung-tanggung, demi membangun tim "pembunuh" ChatGPT, Meta sampai rela menggelontorkan dana fantastis sebesar 15 miliar dollar AS (sekitar Rp 255 triliun) ke startup infrastruktur AI Scale AI. Langkah ini menjadi kunci bagi Meta untuk memboyong pendiri Scale AI, Alexandr Wang, agar mau memimpin divisi baru tersebut bersama Nat Friedman yang sudah bergabung lebih dulu. Dengan memosisikan dirinya langsung di dapur inovasi tersebut, Zuckerberg berharap Meta tak sekadar menjadi pengekor, melainkan bisa segera merebut takhta sebagai raja AI di Silicon Valley. A post shared by Tekno Kompas.com (@teknokompas)

title: 10 Trik Lihat Story Instagram Tanpa Ketahuan dengan Mudah
description: Story Instagram bisa dilihat tanpa ketahuan pemiliknya. Ada beberapa cara melihat Story IG tanpa diketahui yang bisa dilakukan.
content: Jika ingin menonton dengan lebih privasi, pengguna sejatinya ada cara melihat Story IG tanpa diketahui pemiliknya. Lantas, bagaimana cara melihat Story IG tanpa diketahui ? Simak di bawah ini tentang cara melihat Instagram Stories tanpa ketahuan. Cara melihat Story Instagram tanpa diketahui pembuatnya itu sejatinya cukup mudah. Ada banyak pilihan cara melihat Story IG tanpa ketahuan yang bisa dilakukan pengguna. Untuk melakukannya, pengguna bisa memanfaatkan layanan dari website dan aplikasi pihak ketiga. Selain itu, pengguna juga bisa melihat Story IG secara lebih privasi tanpa menggunakan layanan dari platform pihak ketiga. Adapun penjelasan yang lebih lengkap soal beberapa cara melihat Story IG tanpa ketahuan adalah sebagai berikut. Cara melihat Instagram Stories tanpa ketahuan yang pertama adalah dengan mengintip Story IG secara perlahan. Caranya, pengguna bisa mengintip Story IG yang ingin dilihat tanpa ketahuan di jendela peralihan Story dari Story akun sebelumnya. Misalnya, pengguna ingin mengintip Instagram Story dari pengguna @B. Kemudian, di samping kiri Instagram Story @B, terdapat Story dari akun sebelumnya yang misalnya milik akun @A. Untuk melihat Story IG dari akun @B tanpa ketahuan, pengguna bisa memulai dengan melihat dulu Story IG dari akun sebelumnya, yakni akun @A. Setelah itu, pengguna bisa menggeser secara perlahan Story IG akun @A untuk menuju ke Story IG dari akun @B. Geser secara perlahan hingga muncul jendela peralihan Story. Di jendela itu, pengguna bisa mengintip isi Story dari akun @B. Untuk tidak ketahuan, pengguna jangan sampe menggeser jendela peralihan itu, sehingga Story IG akun @B tayang secara penuh. Cara melihat Story Instagram tanpa diketahui pemiliknya yang kedua adalah dengan mengaktifkan mode pesawat. Adapun penjelasan caranya adalah sebagai berikut: Ketiga, pengguna bisa memakai ekstensi atau program mini di Google Chrome. Ada banyak ekstensi di Chrome yang memungkinkan pengguna melihat Story IG tanpa ketahuan. Salah satunya adalah ekstensi “Aplikasi Cerita IG untuk Instagram”. Adapun penjelasan cara melihat Story IG tanpa diketahui menggunakan ekstensi di Chrome adalah sebagai berikut: Keempat, pengguna bisa memakai website Story Saver untuk melihat Story IG tanpa ketahuan. Di website ini, pengguna juga bisa mengunduh Story IG yang dibuat orang lain. Adapun caranya adalah sebagai berikut: Cara melihat Story IG tanpa diketahui pemiliknya yang kelima adalah dengan menggunakan website Anonyig. Di website ini, pengguna dapat mengunduh Story IG yang dibuat orang lain dan melihatnya secara offline. Adapun penjelasan caranya adalah sebagai berikut: Keenam, pengguna bisa memanfaatkan website Stories IG untuk melihat Story tanpa ketahuan. Di website ini, pengguna juga dapat mengunduh Story IG dari orang lain. Adapun penjelasan caranya adalah sebagai berikut:

title: Aktifkan Fitur Ini biar WhatsApp Tidak Bisa Ditelepon Tanpa Blokir Kontak
description: WhatsApp bisa diatur agar tidak bisa ditelepon tanpa diblokir. Begini cara agar WA tidak bisa ditelepon tanpa blokir kontak.
content: Sebab, saat kontak diblokir, mereka tidak akan bisa tak akan bisa menghubungi pengguna lagi sama sekali, termasuk melakukan panggilan telepon WhatsApp. Padahal, kontak yang menelepon pengguna itu bisa jadi penting dan tidak mungkin diblokir. Untungnya, WhatsApp bisa diatur agar tidak bisa ditelepon tanpa perlu blokir kontak. Lantas, bagaimana agar WhatsApp tidak bisa ditelepon? Ini cara agar WA agar tidak bisa ditelepon tanpa diblokir dengan mudah. Cara agar WA tidak bisa ditelepon tanpa diblokir itu pada dasarnya cukup mudah. Dalam cara setting WA agar tidak bisa ditelepon tanpa diblokir ini, pengguna tak perlu repot-repot memakai aplikasi tambahan. Pengguna bisa memanfaatkan beberapa fitur bawaan untuk membuat WA tidak bisa ditelepon tanpa diblokir. Setidaknya, terdapat dua metode yang bisa dilakukan dalam cara agar WA tidak bisa ditelepon tanpa diblokir ini. Pertama, pengguna bisa mengatur agar WhatsApp memblokir otomatis telepon dari nomor tidak dikenal. Kedua, cara setting WA agar tidak bisa ditelepon tanpa diblokir bisa dilakukan dengan mengaktifkan mode DND (Do Not Disturb/Jangan Ganggu) di HP. Adapun penjelasan yang lebih detail dari masing-masing cara agar WA tidak bisa ditelepon tanpa diblokir tersebut adalah sebagai berikut. Cara agar WA tidak bisa ditelepon tanpa diblokir yang pertama adalah memblokir aktivitas panggilan telepon dari nomor tidak dikenal secara otomatis. WhatsApp memiliki fitur yang memungkingkan memblokir otomatis panggilan dari nomor tidak dikenal secara otomatis. Adapun cara mengaktifkan fitur itu adalah sebagai berikut: Cara agar WA tidak bisa ditelepon tanpa diblokir yang berikutnya adalah dengan mengaktifkan mode DND atau Jangan Ganggu di HP. Mode DND dapat menghalau notifikasi dari kontak atau aplikasi di waktu tertentu. Saat mode ini aktif, notifikasi dari aplikasi atau kontak bakal tidak ditampilkan di layar HP sehingga pengguna bisa lebih tenang atau fokus menjalani waktu. Mode DND dapat membuat notifikasi telepon WhatsApp tidak muncul di layar HP. Kemudian, panggilan telepon WhatsApp juga bakal ditolak otomatis. Dengan fitur ini, pengguna tidak akan bisa ditelepon kontak lain di WA tanpa perlu memblokirnya. Adapun cara agar WA tidak bisa ditelepon tanpa diblokir dengan mengaktifkan DND adalah sebagai berikut: Cukup mudah bukan cara setting WA agar tidak bisa ditelepon tanpa diblokir? Dengan dua cara di atas, pengguna tak perlu repot memblokir seseorang agar tidak bisa melakukan panggilan telepon WhatsApp. Pengguna bisa dengan mudah membuat WA tidak bisa ditelepon tanpa diblokir. Demikianlah penjelasan mengenai cara agar WA tidak bisa ditelepon tanpa diblokir dengan mudah dan praktis, semoga bermanfaat.

description: The European Jetmaker Has Long Skirted Subsidy Rules. Now Washington #39;s WTO Complaint Will Drag That Abuse Into The Light Of Day.

title: Furcal Shows No Leniency for Astros
description: Rafael Furcal could be in jail. Instead, he was at Turner Field on Thursday sparking an Atlanta Braves team desperate to avoid another October meltdown.

title: Smaller Can Be Better (Except When It's Not)
description: Stores are stocked with an abundance of featherweight gadgets. But some of these tiny gadgets raise a new question: How small is too small?

title: 'e-Junk' Recycling Still in Its Infancy (AP)
description: AP - When Office Depot, Inc. stores ran an electronics recycling drive last summer that accepted everything from cell phones to televisions, some stores were overwhelmed by the amount of e-trash they received.

title: What if a Sales Tax Were the Only Tax?
description: Does replacing personal income and payroll taxes with a national sales tax, an idea President Bush has shown interest in, help the U.S. tax system?

title: Relentless Els Seals Record Sixth Match Play Title
description: VIRGINIA WATER, England (Reuters) - Ernie Els beat Lee Westwood 2 1 in a gripping final at Wentworth Sunday to win a record sixth World Match Play Championship and claim the biggest first Prize in golf.

title: Do Good! Win a Prize!
description: While Nobel Prizes are given for past performance, other types of inducement prizes are intended to spur innovation. Do they do the job?

title: Kmart appoints Lewis new CEO, president
description: The retailing company Kmart Holding Corp. has appointed Aylwin Lewis, formerly an executive at the restaurant operator Yum Brands Inc.

title: MOURINHO CONFIDENT OVER STRIKE DUO
description: Jose Mourinho believes he has enough firepower in Eidur Gudjohnsen and Mateja Kezman to see off the challenge of CSKA Moscow in the Champions League at Stamford Bridge.

title: Review: Local PC Search Not Perfect (AP)
description: AP - If you want to find a needle of information in the seemingly endless haystack that is the Web, just punch a few words into your favorite Internet search engine. But if you want to pull up a file from your PC's hard drive, good luck.

title: Scientists: New Planets May Take Longer
description: It may take much longer than scientists have thought for violent turbulence to turn grains of space dust into new planets. A NASA telescope recently discovered evidence that

title: NASA says switches may have caused Genesis crash
description: Problems with switches aboard NASA #39;s Genesis solar probe may have kept its parachute from opening, which led to the craft #39;s crash-landing in the Utah desert, the US space agency said.

title: Ohio State Routs Indiana
description: COLUMBUS, Ohio (Sports Network) - Troy Smith threw for 161 yards and two touchdowns, leading the Ohio State Buckeyes to a commanding 30-7 victory over the Indiana Hoosiers in Big Ten action from Ohio Stadium.

title: Ancient baby bird fossil found in China
description: The fossil of what may be one of the earliest baby birds has been found in northeast China. The fossil, estimated at 121 million years old, is curled up as though still in its shell.

title: 'Grand Theft Auto' Seen Breaking Games Sales Record
description: NEW YORK (Reuters) - When the violent video game "Grand Theft Auto: San Andreas" hits stores on Tuesday, its sales could eclipse Hollywood's most successful films, even as it draws the ire of critics.

title: John Deere, iRobot Team Up to Make Robot (AP)
description: AP - In a trailblazing pairing of robotics and tractor companies, iRobot and John Deere announced plans Monday to build a 9-foot-long semi-autonomous battlefield vehicle.

title: New Crop of Portable Players Nips at iPod (AP)
description: AP - Lauren, 11, saunters nonchalantly past a Discovery Channel store and a Gymboree clothing store at the mall. Then suddenly, the girl's eyes light up and she pulls her mother into an Apple Computer Inc. retail shop.

title: Fish Beats Hernych at St. Petersburg
description: Olympic silver medalist Mardy Fish beat Jan Hernych of the Czech Republic 6-2, 6-4 Monday to reach the second round of the St. Petersburg Open.

title: PluggedIn: the OQO Is Not Just Another Handheld Device
description: SAN FRANCISCO (Reuters) - A full-fledged Windows XP computer that's a fraction of the size of a laptop seems like the answer to the digerati's prayers, but the praise greeting the OQO Model 01 has been decidedly muted.

title: Lockheed Martin Profit Jumps 41 in Quarter
description: Lockheed Martin Corp. yesterday reported a 41 percent increase in profit during its third quarter as fighter jet and information technology demand continued to drive growth.

title: Review: a Flat Panel That's Also Deep (AP)
description: AP - Three-dimensional movies at home, without the silly glasses, have been a science-fiction dream for at least as long as Dick Tracy's wristwatch cell phone and the household robot.

title: AGASSI ADVANCES
description: Andre Agassi advanced to the quarter-finals of the Stockholm Open with a comfortable 6-3 6-4 victory over 1997 champion Jonas Bjorkman of Sweden.

title: Voters Checking Out Other Sides #39; Sites
description: Are right-leaning voters spending all their online time on Rushlimbaugh.com? Are left-leaning voters locked into the like-minded Talkingpointsmemo.

title: Study: Firefox still gaining on Internet Explorer
description: Alternative Web browsers Mozilla and Firefox experienced another month of growth at the expense of Microsoft #39;s dominant Internet Explorer, according to an online study.

title: Scientists close in on source of cosmic rays
description: An international team of astronomers believe they have solved a mystery that has been perplexing scientists for 100 years -- the origin of cosmic rays.

title: Munch Museum to stay closed well into 2005
description: Oslo #39;s Munch Museum could remain closed until June 2005 while officials upgrade its security system following a brazen daylight robbery in August of two Edvard Munch masterpieces.

title: Fifth-Ranked Wisconsin Beats Minnesota
description: MADISON, Wisconsin (Sports Network) - John Stocco ran for two touchdowns and threw for another score to lead fifth-ranked Wisconsin to a 38-14 win over Minnesota in the Big Ten Conference at Camp Randall Stadium.

title: 8 EBay Sellers Admit to Phony Bids (AP)
description: AP - Eight eBay sellers were ordered to pay nearly #36;90,000 in restitution and fines after admitting they bid up products online to inflate the prices.

title: NBA Wrap: Mavericks Come Back to Beat Golden State
description: DALLAS (Sports Network) - Dirk Nowitzki scored 25 points and grabbed 10 rebounds as the Dallas Mavericks overcame an early 17-point deficit for a 101-98 overtime victory against Golden State at American Airlines Center.

title: Thousands in Kashmir Protest Alleged Rape
description: Police in Kashmir fired tear gas and used batons Wednesday to disperse thousands of people protesting the alleged rape of a woman and her daughter by soldiers.

title: Registers ring, stores are listening
description: Consumers shrugged off rising energy costs and kept spending in October, boosting retail sales and supporting forecasts of a solid holiday season ahead for retailers.

title: Vote Fraud Theories, Spread by Blogs, Are Quickly Buried
description: Some Web logs were swift to provide dark theories about the presidential election, but others were just as quick to debunk them.

title: US to build wireless network for future warfare (AFP)
description: AFP - The Pentagon, which invented the precursor to the internet 40 years ago, has laid the first connections for a secure, wireless information network that proponents say will fundamentally transform warfare, a US newspaper reported.

title: Top-Ranked USC Beats UCLA to Finished Season Undefeated
description: LOS ANGELES (Sports Network) - Reggie Bush ran for 204 yards and a pair of long touchdowns as No. 1 Southern California edged UCLA, 29-24, in a regular season-ending Pac-10 showdown between cross-town rivals at the Rose Bowl.

title: GM to Close Van Factory In Baltimore
description: General Motors Corp. said yesterday that it will shut its 70-year-old van factory in southeast Baltimore next year, confirming a closure that some 1,100 workers have long expected but that state officials had hoped to stave off.

title: Dulles, BWI Consider Security Shift
description: Officials at Dulles International and Baltimore-Washington International airports said they are considering the replacement of federal airport screeners at security checkpoints with workers employed by private contractors.

title: eBay Agrees to Limit Racial Slurs on Auction Site (Reuters)
description: Reuters - Internet auction house eBay Inc.\said on Wednesday it would limit the use of racial slurs after\U.S. city officials complained the offensive terms were being\used to advertise lawn jockeys and other antiques.

title: Duffield: Oracle's skewing facts on stock sales
description: PeopleSoft's CEO fires back at rival, saying it's wrong about his stock transactions. Both companies scramble ahead of Friday deadline.

description: It #39;s the fight computer gamers have been waiting for. But the latest duel between wise old master Nintendo and challenger Sony is not taking place on a TV screen.

title: Chicago to Sell City-Related Items on EBay (AP)
description: AP - City officials hope there are people willing to pay plenty of money to own a vintage Playboy Bunny costume, toss green dye into the Chicago River or throw a dinner party prepared by Oprah Winfrey's chef.

title: Researchers develop 3-D phone technology

title: Product Review: MSN's WebTV Grows Up (AP)
description: AP - During the dot-com boom, people who didn't want to miss out on the Web and e-mail craze but didn't want to buy a real computer could get WebTV, which delivered the Internet through the warm, friendly glow of their TV sets.

title: College Basketball: Kansas, Oklahoma State Win
description: LAWRENCE, Kan. (Sports Network) - Wayne Simien scored 14 points with 10 rebounds to lead No. 2 Kansas over Nevada, 85-52, at Allen Fieldhouse.

title: US Upholds Tariffs on Shrimp Imports
description: The Bush administration on Tuesday upheld the imposition of penalty tariffs on shrimp imports from China and Vietnam, handing a victory to beleaguered US shrimp producers.

title: 3 Former Kmart Execs Charged with Fraud
description: WASHINGTON (Reuters) - Three former Kmart executives and representatives of several major vendors were charged on Thursday with fraudulently accounting for \$24 million of profit before the retailer filed for bankruptcy in 2002.

title: Apple Launches iTunes Music Store in Canada
description: SAN FRANCISCO (Reuters) - Apple Computer Inc. on Thursday launched its iTunes online music store in Canada, the 14th country in which the popular service is available.

title: Boeing Changes Management in Key Division
description: Boeing Co. changed management of its commercial aircraft division yesterday, replacing the head of the sales team after losing several competitions to its European rival Airbus SAS.

title: EU Wants to Make Internet Safe for Children
description: The European Union has launched a 45 million euro (\$60 million) plan to protect children from pornography and racist sites when they surf the Internet.

title: Microsoft Helps in Bogus Degrees Case
description: Some sleuthing by software giant Microsoft Corp. helped track down two brothers who authorities say sold bogus college degrees over the Internet, including an MBA that was issued to a housecat.

title: Photo: XM's portable satellite radio
description: XM Satellite Radio Holdings introduced a handheld portable version of its satellite radio.

title: NASA spacecraft tracks global air pollution
description: A NASA spacecraft has begun the first-ever daily tracking of how air pollution moves across the globe, a scientist at NASA #39;s Jet Propulsion Laboratory said on Wednesday.

title: US Airways, Flight Attendants Closer to Deal
description: The lead negotiators for US Airways flight attendants reached a tentative agreement on a new contract that will save the carrier about \$94 million a year, officials from both sides said yesterday.

title: Lilly Warns Doctors on Strattera Use
description: The drug maker Eli Lilly amp; Co. said Friday it is warning doctors to stop using its attention deficit disorder drug Strattera in patients with jaundice or laboratory evidence of liver injury.
